description:
In which I make a custom, 3D printed fully mechanical split flap display!

Support me on Patreon: https://patreon.com/AdamGMakes

Design files for the board are available at the following links. I haven't organized anything and it's probably a bit of a mess to parse through, but feel free if you're so inclined!

https://github.com/Gordoa40/SplitFlapDisplay
https://cad.onshape.com/documents/87c916b33ca5d6492b457485/w/b3e5f0f05f6619e6e7931347/e/f0b025b21eb5f34275af7be1?renderMode=0&uiState=69ea3aa075ceb550753c09cb

Printable Split Flap by Morgan Manley: https://www.instructables.com/Split-Flap-Display-3D-Printed-Modular-Compact-Encl/

Split Flap Project by Scott Bezek: https://github.com/scottbez1/splitflap

0:00 - Introduction
0:39 - Split Flap Explanation
2:12 - A look at my first attempt
3:37 - Design Criteria
4:54 - adding more flaps
6:02 - PCB design (first attempt)
7:48 - module mount and data bus
10:25 - assembling the first module
12:32 - putting it all together
19:30 - finale



Music courtesy of www.epidemicsound.com
Peter Crosby / Late Night Appetite
El Flaco / Eternal Light
Hara Noda / Wood & Skin
Scientific / Sunset
Dusty/ The Mood and The Sky
Dyalla / Brooklyn
Nyck Caution / Get Yours (Instrumental Version)
Wendy Marcini / Lit 'n' Legit
Mizlo / Morning Coffee
